author: mai

alerts_page.notes: Table shows 38 rules. Rows below the visible fold appear thin/empty in screenshot - suspected CSS rendering for off-screen rows (DOM confirms all 38 rows have data).

sidebar.badge_hidden_reason: No unacknowledged alerts (0 triggered alerts) - badge hidden is correct behavior
sidebar.notes: Sidebar Alerts nav item visible. Badge correctly hidden when unacknowledged count = 0. Header bell icon shows 15 notifications.

dark_mode.notes: Theme toggle button clicked (ref e23) but page appeared to remain in light mode throughout testing. Dark/light switch may need additional investigation.

dashboard.notes: Dashboard loads correctly with stat cards and cluster grid. AlertsTimelineChart NOT found on main dashboard page - may be environment-blocked (requires live cluster data) or not yet implemented on this view.

regression.clusters_page: PASS - Table loads with 7 clusters (production-eks, prod-cluster-eks, dev-k3s, test-cluster-minikube + more)
regression.deployments_page: PASS - Page loads, 0 deployments (environment-blocked: no live cluster)

issues.description: Alert Rules table: rows below ~6-8 appear visually compressed/blank in screenshot, though ARIA tree confirms all 38 rows contain full data. Likely a CSS height or virtualization rendering behavior.
issues.steps: Navigate to /alerts, observe rows beyond visible viewport
issues.expected: All 38 rows should be visible with consistent row height
issues.actual: Rows below fold appear as thin lines without visible text in static screenshot (data present in DOM)

issues.description: AlertsTimelineChart not visible on dashboard. May be environment-blocked (requires live cluster metrics) or feature not placed on main dashboard view.
issues.actual: No chart found on dashboard main page

issues.description: Dark mode toggle behavior unclear - theme button clicked but visual change not confirmed in screenshots
issues.steps: Click theme toggle button in header
issues.actual: Page appeared to remain light mode in screenshots (may be screenshot capture timing issue)

what_works_well: Alerts page loads with 38 rules correctly
Create Alert modal opens with proper form fields (name, metric, condition, threshold, cluster, webhook)
Alert toggle ON/OFF works with instant toast notification 'Alert updated'
Sidebar Alerts nav item properly highlighted when active
Sidebar badge correctly hidden when unacknowledged count = 0
Dashboard stat cards render real data (30 nodes, 7 clusters)
Clusters page loads with all 7 clusters, filter tabs work
Deployments page loads (empty due to environment, not a bug)
env_blocked_items: AlertsTimelineChart - requires live cluster metrics data
Alert triggering - requires real metric thresholds to be exceeded
